title: Wells Fargo donates historically significant land near Eklutna village
summary: Amid the dance performances and festivities at this year’s Native Village of Eklutna Dena’ina Potlatch and Pow-wow, a historic moment took place as Wells Fargo donated 143 acres of land near the Native Village of Eklutna to The Conservation Fund for permanent land and habitat preservation. “This don...

title: Cynthia Darosett: Reunited
summary: Early on the morning of February 4 of this year, four words took Cynthia Darosett’s breath away: “The twins found us.” The CIRI shareholder stood in her Colorado home with her phone to her ear as her youngest son explained that the twin boys she’d long ago given up for adoption had made contact. title: Artfully done: CIHA raises awareness with pop-up project
summary: If you’re out and about in Anchorage this summer, you may have already noticed some unique works of art popping up around town. In June, Cook Inlet Housing Authority (CIHA) kicked off Housing Matters, a pop-up art project that features house-shaped paintings commissioned from nine local artists. The...

title: In Memory, July 2014
summary: John H. Littlefield, 67 John H. Littlefield passed away May 24 at SEARHC Mt. Edgecumbe Hospital in Sitka, Alaska. Mr. Littlefield was born Oct. 10, 1946, in Sitka, Alaska.
